title: Wicked City
writer: Michel Arnaud, Jean-Pierre Aumont, Marcel Cravenne
actors: Maria Montez, Jean-Pierre Aumont, Lilli Palmer
plot: After his freighter pulls into Marseille, Canadian seaman Eric Martin falls in love with Dolores, a cabaret girl (American version of a prostitute in the French version) at the "Kitcat" Club, and she agrees to wait for him. Leavin...
